sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُنْفَرِدَةً فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْمَرْكَزِ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam jednokrevetnu sobu u hotelu blizu centra.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a single room in a hotel near the center.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا وَصَلْتُ، قَدَّمْتُ جَوَازَ سَفَرِي لِلْمُوَظَّفِ فِي الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Kada sam stigao, predao sam svoj pasoš službeniku na recepciji.
sentences.translationEn: When I arrived, I presented my passport to the employee at the reception.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْغُرْفَةُ نَظِيفَةً وَتُطِلُّ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Soba je bila čista i imala je pogled na more.
sentences.translationEn: The room was clean and overlooked the sea.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ عَنْ مَوْعِدِ وُجْبَةِ الْإِفْطَارِ فِي مَطْعَمِ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam za vrijeme doručka u hotelskom restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: I asked about the breakfast time in the hotel restaurant.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَنِي الْمُوَظَّفُ أَنَّ الْإِفْطَارَ يَبْدَأُ فِي السَّاعَةِ السَّابِعَةِ صَبَاحاً.
sentences.translation: Službenik mi je rekao da doručak počinje u sedam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The employee told me that breakfast starts at seven in the morning.
